name: ASR — Complete Platform Automation
description: Master n8n workflow connecting all ASR systems: leads → outreach → follow-ups → candidate intake → placement tracking

nodes.name: Run Lead Discovery
nodes.notes: Calls asr_lead_engine.py via simple FastAPI wrapper (see api/main.py)

parameters.subject: =Pre-screened {{ $json.roles }} candidates ready for {{ $json.company }} — {{ $json.city }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.hr_name || 'Hiring Manager' }},

I noticed {{ $json.company }} is actively hiring for {{ $json.roles }} in {{ $json.city }}.

We're AS Recruitment — we place pre-screened, AI-scored candidates within 48 hours.

• Pay only when candidate successfully joins
• 30-day free replacement guarantee
• Current database: 5,000+ candidates in your region

Can I share 5 pre-screened profiles today?

Best,
Srijan Ji | AS Recruitment
+91-XXXXXXXXXX

parameters.subject: =RE: Candidates for {{ $json.company }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.hr_name || 'Hiring Manager' }},

Following up — I still have pre-screened {{ $json.roles }} candidates ready for {{ $json.company }}.

Can I share 5 profiles? Takes 2 minutes to review.

Reply YES and I'll send them immediately.

Best, Srijan | AS Recruitment

parameters.subject: =Quick check — {{ $json.company }} hiring update
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.hr_name || 'Hiring Manager' }},

Are you still looking to fill {{ $json.roles }} positions?

Our model: Zero upfront cost. Pay only when candidate joins.

Happy to send profiles immediately.

Srijan | AS Recruitment

nodes.name: Webhook — New Candidate (WhatsApp Bot)
nodes.notes: Fired by whatsapp_bot.py when a new candidate completes registration

text.body: =✅ Profile saved! Score: {{ $json.overall_score }}/100. We'll contact you when a job matches in {{ $json.city }}. — AS Recruitment

nodes.name: Webhook — HR Reply Detected
nodes.notes: Trigger when Gmail detects a reply to our outreach email (use Gmail trigger or polling)

parameters.subject: RE: Great — let's connect
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thank you for your interest!

Here's my calendar to book a 10-minute call:
https://calendly.com/asrecruitment/30min

I'll share 5 pre-screened profiles on the call.

Best, Srijan | AS Recruitment

import_instructions: 1. Open n8n at http://localhost:5678  (install: npx n8n)
2. Click + → Import from JSON → paste this file
3. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID in all Google Sheets nodes
5. Configure Gmail credentials (OAuth2 or App Password)
6. Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID in n8n environment
7. Set WHATSAPP_API_KEY and YOUR_PHONE_ID in WhatsApp node
